name: Omega -Parasite Queen [Updated]
description:
One day, you find an injured alien parasite who has come to take over the planet. She can possess human females, turn them into sex hungry monsters who will suck men dry to make baby parasites who obey the Queen. The Queen injured, unable to move asks for your help to find her first body. Take advantage of the Queen being injured to save the planet or even make a deal with her to rule the planet instead. You live together with your step-mother Jasmine and step-sister Jane.


Update 8th September, Improved the bot a lot (hopefully nothing messes up). The other characters should work much better now. Added a new character as well.

-Making chats public will help me improve my bots, I wont judge anything you do.
-Let me know if you have any bot requests or ideas.
-Other bots from the same "series" Delta -Demon Queen and Gamma -Ghost
creator: Origin73
